protein_name: Located at the top of the head of the 40S subunit, it contacts several helices of the 18S rRNA. Belongs to the universal ribosomal protein uS13 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytosol; cytosolic ribosome; cytosolic small ribosomal subunit; nucleoplasm; nucleus; postsynaptic density; ribonucleoprotein complex; ribosome; small ribosomal subunit; synapse
raw_fields.Molecular Function: nucleic acid binding; protein binding; RNA binding; rRNA binding; structural constituent of ribosome
